results.snippet: Heat Sinks are available at Mouser Electronics from industry leading manufacturers. Mouser is an authorized distributor for many heat sink manufacturers including Aavid, Advanced Thermal Solutions, Seeed Studio, Vicor, Wakefield Thermal & more.

results.title: Heat Sinks | Thermal | Electronic Components Distributor DigiKey
results.snippet: Heat sinks are thermal management components designed to dissipate heat from high-power electronic devices and prevent overheating. results.title: Wakefield Thermal Air Cooled Bonded Fin Heatsinks
results.snippet: Bonded fin heat sinks are used when the required combination of large heat sink size, tall fins, and high fin density make simple extrusions impractical. We offer these products in our standard catalogue and also custom fabricated to meet a customer's specific needs.

results.title: Cool Innovations
results.snippet: Cool Innovations is a leading designer and manufacturer of pin fin heat sinks and fan sinks. Since 1996 Cool Innovations has been providing cutting edge thermal management solutions to a wide range of industries.

results.title: Extruded Heatsink - Cofan Thermal
results.snippet: An extruded aluminum heatsink is a precision-engineered thermal management device designed to dissipate heat from high-power electronic components, ensuring they operate within safe temperature ranges and maintain peak performance. results.title: Aluminum Heatsink Suppliers | HeatsinkUSA
results.snippet: HeatsinkUSA's aluminum heatsinks are extruded in Belding, Michigan, USA. We supply companies and individuals with quality heatsinks online for use in a large variety of applications, including commercial LED Lighting, Audio, Electronics, Industrial, Medical, Aerospace, and Defense.
